title: NMUGCEPI/sc_eQTL: sc_eQTL
author: NMUGCEPI
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
We present a comprehensive protocol for conducting a single-cell eQTL atlas of particular tissue and integrating with genome-wide association study (GWAS) data, in order to uncover cell-type-specific genetic regulation and identify cell-type-specific disease risk genes. We detail critical steps including multiplexed sequencing of pooled samples, single cell cis-eQTL mapping, integrating single-cell eQTLs with GWAS, and explore regulatory mechanism underlying cell type-specific cis-eQTLs based on scATAC-seq data. This protocol enables researchers to link genetic variants to gene expression changes in single-cell level for particular tissue, helping to identify candidate risk genes and regulatory mechanisms underlying disease susceptibility. To facilitate the use of this protocol, we have provided example input files for each step as well as the corresponding running code.
Attention: Some key data files have been uploaded in the release, including:
1.matrix.mtx(2.single cell QC and cluster/input/)
2.celltype.RDS(3.single cell eqtl/)
3.sample.vcf.gz(3.single cell eqtl/)
4.scRNA.RDS(6.scATAC/)
steps_raw:
